commands.review_summary:
The PR adds an installable `tokenomics` plugin with model-usage spend ingestion, a Gateway diagnostics report route, JSON-backed ledger/pricing files, docs, tests, package metadata, and lockfile entries.

PR surface: Source +1047, Tests +235, Docs +143, Config +51, Other +6. Total +1482 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR behavior from source inspection: current main only grants `internalDiagnostics` to `diagnostics-otel` and `diagnostics-prometheus`, while this service returns without subscribing when that grant is absent. I did not run a live Gateway repro in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Maintainers need to decide the product/API/security direction before automation can safely repair this PR.

target.title: fix(openai): bound JSON/text response reads to prevent OOM
target.body:
## What Problem This Solves

Bound OpenAI provider HTTP response reads using shared provider helpers
to prevent unbuffered JSON/text from untrusted upstream responses.

## Changes

| File | Change |
|------|--------|
| `extensions/openai/embedding-batch.ts` | `readProviderJsonResponse<OpenAiBatchStatus>` (shared 16 MiB default) for batch status JSON |
| `extensions/openai/openai-chatgpt-oauth-flow.runtime.ts` | `readResponseWithLimit` (1 MiB) in `postTokenForm` to cap body before re-wrapping in `new Response()` |
| `extensions/openai/realtime-provider-shared.ts` | `readProviderJsonResponse` (shared default) for client secret JSON |

## Evidence

### Real HTTP bounded-read proof

```
node --import tsx test/_proof_bounded_json.mts

PASS  oversized body: throws bounded cap error
PASS  stream cancelled at cap: bytesSent=1048576
PASS  happy path: small JSON parsed correctly
PASS  negative control: unbounded read buffers PAST cap
[proof] 4 PASS, 0 FAIL
```

### Changed-path proof: OpenAI embedding batch tests

```
pnpm exec vitest run extensions/openai/embedding-batch.test.ts

 ✓ OpenAI embedding batch output > wraps malformed JSONL output
 ✓ OpenAI embedding batch output > splits provider uploads by serialized JSONL byte cap
 ✓ OpenAI embedding batch output > adapts OpenAI-compatible upload groups after payload-size rejection
 ✓ OpenAI embedding batch output > bounds batch resource error bodies without using response.text()

 Test Files  1 passed (1)
      Tests  4 passed (4)
```

_AI-assisted._
